tone.notes: Australians respond well to directness and a relaxed tone. Avoid being too salesy or American-corporate — it lands poorly. Use first-name basis from email 1. Short sentences. Light wit is fine in subject lines. Don't oversell — Australians are culturally skeptical of hype.

blackout_periods.name: Easter Long Weekend
blackout_periods.description: Good Friday to Easter Monday — peak boating weekend, operators on-water

blackout_periods.name: Christmas to Australia Day
blackout_periods.description: Dec 24 – Jan 26 — extended summer holiday period, very low B2B responsiveness

localization.measurement_notes: Use meters for berth/boat length. Use liters for fuel. Use AUD.

compliance.opt_out_language: To unsubscribe, reply UNSUBSCRIBE or click here.
compliance.required_footer: You're receiving this because you operate a marina or marine business in Australia.
compliance.notes: Australian Spam Act requires a functional unsubscribe mechanism and sender identification in every commercial email.

cultural_notes: Australian marina market is concentrated around Sydney Harbour, Port Phillip Bay (Melbourne), Moreton Bay (Brisbane), and the Whitsundays. Summer peak is December–February (opposite of Northern Hemisphere). The Christmas–January period is the busiest boating season — marina operators are fully occupied and unlikely to respond to outreach. Target autumn (March–May) for new customer conversations. Many Australian marinas are associated with sailing clubs and have volunteer committee structures — target the paid marina manager or operations coordinator.
